text_block_list.text:
As I'm heading to the cafeteria for lunch, I see an
Umamusume who, for some reason, is staring
intently at the other students as they eat.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Stare...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I am observing everyone's behavior.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Simply by observing these mealtimes, I can
gain insight into everyone's priorities. For
example...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Cake again, Creek? You might end up regretting
those extra calories, you know?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's lunchtime, after all. And they do say
dessert is food for the soul.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've barely had anything yourself, Inari. You
only asked for a small portion of soba. Is that
enough for you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Y-yep, it's plenty! Finishing soba swiftly is
considered the epitome of chic!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As you can see... for racers, even daily meals are
an essential part of training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Which means there must be various approaches
to them. I wish to understand and learn from
these perspectives.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
At the dojo, it was commonplace to learn by
watching other students train, you see.
choice_data_list: So what's your own approach to meals?
So what's your own approach to meals?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I prioritize nutritional balance. I strive not to
become too accustomed to luxury or gourmet
foods.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I imagine others have their own ways of
thinking. And the more exceptional the runner,
the more steadfast her philosophies...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm starving.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri... A top-notch talent, indeed. I must
carefully observe her choices.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, what to choose, what to choose?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Right. I'll start with the miso mackerel set.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, she chose the same meal I did. Mackerel is
rich in nutrients, so I assume Oguri must also
value hea—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ten portions should do it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely need some hamburger steaks too.
Five plates of those. And five portions of the
extra-large katsudon. Oh, they have rice balls
too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Those would go well with pickled vegetables...
Hmmm, katsudon alone just isn't enough fried
food... I'd better grab some fried chicken too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I can't make sense of it! What could possibly
compel Oguri to order such copious—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah! Could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is she... using these meals as a way to test her
limits?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That would explain why she's eating so much!
Have I been underestimating the significance of
meals all along?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will not fall behind! I'll follow her lead and go for
seconds!
choice_data_list:
Eating an amount that's right for you is probably
best...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! The time has come to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I'd like five more portions of the
tatsuta fried chicken and three more of the ginger
pork set!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're going in for more too, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri. You have opened my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not even my stomach can be allowed to lag
behind! I must catch up!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What? Catch up? Ketchup...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I should try some on my fried chicken. And I'm
ordering some of that ginger pork too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're right... I, too, have my own thoughts
and reasoning behind my meal choices...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to martial arts, wavering and
being fickle achieves nothing... I almost strayed
from my path and lost sight of myself there.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... That said...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... Now what about dessert?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll have donuts, cheese tarts, crepes... And I'll
throw some fruits in for a refreshing touch...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri is truly to be feared. Her meal choices
alone shake me to my core. I have much to learn...
